# GroupDocs.Metadata MCP Server

MCP server that exposes GroupDocs.Metadata for .NET — read, write, and remove document metadata via AI agents (Claude, Cursor, VS Code / GitHub Copilot, and other MCP-compatible clients).

## Install

- With dnx (.NET 10 SDK, no install step): `dnx GroupDocs.Metadata.Mcp@26.4.3 --yes`
- As a global dotnet tool: `dotnet tool install -g GroupDocs.Metadata.Mcp` then run `groupdocs-metadata-mcp`
- As a Docker container: `docker run --rm -i -v $(pwd)/documents:/data ghcr.io/groupdocs-metadata/metadata-net-mcp:latest`

## MCP tools

- ReadMetadata — extract all metadata properties (author, title, dates, EXIF, XMP, IPTC, custom) as grouped JSON
- RemoveMetadata — strip all metadata from a document and save a clean copy

## Supported formats

PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, JPEG, PNG, TIFF, MP3, MP4, WAV, AVI, and 50+ other document, image, and media formats.

## Environment variables

- GROUPDOCS_MCP_STORAGE_PATH — base folder for input + output (defaults to current working directory)
- GROUPDOCS_MCP_OUTPUT_PATH — optional, routes output files to a separate folder
- GROUPDOCS_LICENSE_PATH — path to GroupDocs.Total.lic, omit for evaluation mode

## Key links

- NuGet: https://www.nuget.org/packages/GroupDocs.Metadata.Mcp
- Repository: https://github.com/groupdocs-metadata/GroupDocs.Metadata.Mcp
- Docker: ghcr.io/groupdocs-metadata/metadata-net-mcp and docker.io/groupdocs/metadata-net-mcp
- License: MIT

## Example prompts for AI agents

- "Read the metadata from report.pdf"
- "What's the author and creation date of contract.docx?"
- "Remove all metadata from every file in the /uploads folder"
- "Does sample.jpg have GPS coordinates in its EXIF data?"
